business.name: Ghola
business.description: Private AI that runs on-device or through end-to-end encrypted cloud inference, with agent payments and verifiable receipts.

services.name: Ghola Chat
services.description: Authenticated Ghola chat endpoint. Returns an SSE stream for user and agent chat sessions.

services.name: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions
services.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint for Ghola models and configured providers.

services.name: OpenAI-compatible Models
services.description: List models available through the OpenAI-compatible Ghola API surface.

services.name: Agent Marketplace Discovery
services.description: Discover x402-payable Ghola agents available for programmatic use.

services.name: Model Marketplace
services.description: Browse featured live models available through Ghola's model marketplace.

services.name: Payment Gateway
services.description: x402 payment gateway for merchant and model routes. Append a registered merchant slug to call a paid route.

services.name: Receipt Service Health
services.description: Health endpoint for Ghola's receipt anchoring service.
